footer.description: The fair and transparent crypto prize platform. Provably fair draws, instant payouts.

about.title: About WinuWallet
about.subtitle: The transparent crypto prize competition platform, built in the UK.
about.missionText: WinuWallet is a UK-registered prize competition platform that lets anyone enter to win real cryptocurrency. Every draw is conducted using verifiable on-chain randomness — results are public, permanent, and auditable by anyone.
about.how1Text: Choose a live competition and purchase one or more entry tickets securely with your card via Stripe.
about.how2Text: When the competition closes, a winner is selected using cryptographically secure, publicly verifiable randomness recorded on-chain.
about.how3Text: The winning amount is sent in cryptocurrency directly to the winner's wallet within minutes of the draw.
about.legalText: WinuWallet operates under an exemption from the Gambling Act 2005 applicable to prize competitions where the outcome is not determined by chance alone. All competitions comply with UK consumer law. Participation is open to residents aged 18 and over.
about.stripeText: All payments are processed securely by Stripe, a globally trusted payment provider. WinuWallet never stores your card details.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about WinuWallet prize competitions.
faq.q1: How do I enter a competition?
faq.a1: Browse the active competitions on our Competitions page, choose one that interests you, select the number of tickets you want to purchase, and complete payment securely via Stripe. Your tickets are issued instantly after payment is confirmed.
faq.a2: When a competition closes (either the ticket cap is reached or the end date passes), a winner is selected using cryptographically secure randomness. The result is recorded on-chain, making it publicly verifiable and tamper-proof.
faq.a3: Yes. WinuWallet operates as a prize competition under an exemption from the Gambling Act 2005 applicable in the United Kingdom. Competitions require an element of skill or are otherwise structured to comply with applicable law. We are a UK-registered company.
faq.q4: How do I receive my prize?
faq.a4: If you win, we will contact you by email to collect your cryptocurrency wallet address. The prize amount is then transferred directly to your wallet. Please ensure the wallet address you provide supports the relevant cryptocurrency.
faq.a5: Ticket purchases are non-refundable once a competition is live and your entry has been registered. If a competition is cancelled by WinuWallet before it closes, all ticket holders will receive a full refund to their original payment method.
faq.q6: What is the minimum age to participate?
faq.a6: You must be at least 18 years old to enter any competition on WinuWallet. By purchasing a ticket, you confirm you meet this requirement. WinuWallet reserves the right to verify age and cancel entries where this requirement is not met.
faq.a7: All payments are processed by Stripe, one of the world's most trusted payment processors. WinuWallet never sees or stores your card details. All transactions are protected by SSL/TLS encryption.
faq.q8: What happens if a competition does not fill up?
faq.a8: Each competition has a specified end date. If the maximum ticket count is not reached by that date, the competition will close on the end date and a winner will still be drawn from the tickets sold at that point, provided at least one ticket was purchased.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: WinuWallet Ltd ('WinuWallet', 'we', 'us', 'our') is committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with the UK General Data Protection Regulation (UK GDPR) and the Data Protection Act 2018. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.
privacy.s1Text: WinuWallet Ltd is a company registered in England and Wales. We operate the WinuWallet prize competition platform accessible at winuwallet.com. For data protection enquiries, contact us at: privacy@winuwallet.com
privacy.s2Text: We collect the following categories of personal data: (a) Identity & contact data — your email address, provided when you create an account or sign in. (b) Transaction data — ticket purchase history, payment amounts, competition entries, and winning records. (c) Technical data — IP address, browser type, device information, and usage logs collected automatically when you use our platform. (d) Payment data — payment processing is handled entirely by Stripe. We do not store your card number, CVV, or full card details. Stripe may collect and store payment data subject to their own Privacy Policy.
privacy.s3Text: We use your personal data to: operate your account and provide access to competitions; process ticket purchases and manage your entries; conduct draws and notify winners; comply with legal obligations (anti-fraud, age verification, financial record-keeping); send transactional emails (purchase confirmations, winner notifications); improve our platform based on aggregate usage analytics.
privacy.s4Text: We process your personal data on the following legal bases: Contract — processing necessary to perform the competition contract with you. Legal obligation — compliance with UK law. Legitimate interests — fraud prevention, platform security, and analytics.
privacy.s5Text: We use essential cookies required for authentication and session management. We may also use analytics cookies to understand how visitors use our platform. You can control non-essential cookies through your browser settings. Our platform uses Supabase for authentication, which sets session cookies necessary for secure login.
privacy.s6Text: We share your data only with trusted service providers necessary to operate our platform: Stripe (payment processing), Supabase (database and authentication), Resend (transactional email delivery), and Vercel (hosting). All providers are bound by data processing agreements and comply with UK GDPR.
privacy.s7Text: We retain your account data for as long as your account is active. Transaction records are retained for 7 years to comply with financial regulations. You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time (see Your Rights below), subject to any legal retention obligations.
privacy.s8Text: Under UK GDPR, you have the right to: access your personal data; correct inaccurate data; request erasure of your data; object to or restrict processing; data portability; withdraw consent at any time (where processing is based on consent). To exercise any of these rights, email us at privacy@winuwallet.com. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) at ico.org.uk.
privacy.s9Text: You may close your account and withdraw from the platform at any time by contacting us at privacy@winuwallet.com. Ticket purchases already made for live competitions are non-refundable (see Terms of Service), but no further charges will be made after account closure.
privacy.s10Text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Material changes will be communicated by email or a prominent notice on the platform. Your continued use of WinuWallet after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ('Terms') govern your use of the WinuWallet platform operated by WinuWallet Ltd, a company registered in England and Wales. By creating an account or purchasing tickets, you agree to these Terms.
terms.s1Text: You must be at least 18 years of age and a resident of a jurisdiction where participation in prize competitions is lawful. WinuWallet reserves the right to verify your age and identity at any time. Employees and directors of WinuWallet Ltd, and their immediate family members, are not eligible to participate.
terms.s2Text: WinuWallet operates prize competitions that are exempt from the Gambling Act 2005 under applicable UK law. These are not lotteries or games of chance. Entry requires a financial contribution (ticket purchase) and winners are selected by a method that includes a verifiable and impartial process.
terms.s3Text: Tickets may be purchased using a valid payment method via Stripe. All prices are displayed in USD. By completing a purchase, you agree to pay the stated ticket price. Your entry is confirmed upon receipt of payment. WinuWallet reserves the right to cancel purchases in cases of fraud or system error.
terms.s4Text: Each competition specifies a maximum ticket count and/or an end date. The draw is conducted using cryptographically secure, publicly verifiable randomness once the competition closes. The winning ticket holder will be notified by email. Winners must provide a valid cryptocurrency wallet address within 30 days to claim their prize.
terms.s5Text: If a winner fails to provide a valid wallet address within 30 days of notification, the prize may be forfeited and carried over to a future competition at WinuWallet's discretion.
terms.s6Text: Ticket purchases are non-refundable once your entry has been registered and the competition is live. If WinuWallet cancels a competition before it closes, all ticket holders will receive a full refund to their original payment method within 5–10 business days.
terms.s7Text: You agree not to: use automated systems or bots to purchase tickets; create multiple accounts; attempt to manipulate or interfere with draws; provide false identity or age information; engage in any conduct that violates applicable law.
terms.s8Text: WinuWallet's liability to you is limited to the value of tickets you have purchased. We are not liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages. We do not guarantee the availability of the platform at all times and reserve the right to suspend competitions for maintenance or regulatory reasons.
terms.s9Text: Cryptocurrency values are volatile. Prize amounts are fixed in USD at the time of the competition. The actual cryptocurrency amount transferred at the time of payout will be calculated at the prevailing market rate and may differ from the advertised approximate equivalent. WinuWallet is not responsible for fluctuations in cryptocurrency value.
terms.s10Text: These Terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.
terms.s11Text: For questions about these Terms, contact us at legal@winuwallet.com.
